name: Expandable TV Top Shelf Mount - dealworthy™
description:
The Expandable TV Top Shelf Mount from dealworthy™ is crafted from durable steel, offering a sturdy solution for organizing your device. This black utility wall shelf features a fixed design with a single shelf designed for easy and convenient use. It supports a maximum weight capacity of 11 pounds, making it ideal for storing various electronic devices securely.

dealworthy™: Just what you need, priced just right.
100% Satisfaction Guaranteed or your Money Back.
